# lazygit — keybindings

## lazygit

### Navigate

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `1 … 5` | Switch panel (status/files/branches/commits/stash) |
| `?` | Help (all keybinds) |

### Stage

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `Space` | Stage / unstage file |
| `a` | Stage all |

### Commit

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `c` | Commit |

### Sync

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `P` | Push |
| `p` | Pull |

### History

| Key | Action |
|---|---|
| `z` | Undo |
